name: Rick McGinty
subject: Sign Katie’s birthday card?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9189584164792303616/328504387565518848?refcode=e20160510&refcode2=e20160510&amount=25)
---
Friend,

Most people don't know that my sister Katie and I share a birthday -- and it's coming up tomorrow, May 11th.

Growing up with nine siblings, it was sometimes hard for our parents to make ends meet, and we weren't always fortunate enough to get birthday gifts. But whenever people asked me what I got for my birthday, I proudly told them: "My little sister!"

I was proud of Katie back then and I'm even prouder of her today, and of everything she's achieved since we were kids. And **[I don't mind sharing the birthday spotlight at all -- in fact, I'd love it if you signed my birthday card for Katie wishing her a special day:](https://act.myngp.com/el/9189584164792303616/400561981603446784?refcode=e20160510&refcode2=e20160510&ms=e20160510&amount=25)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9189584164792303616/400561981603446784?refcode=e20160510&refcode2=e20160510&ms=e20160510&amount=25)
---

Katie and I didn't have much growing up in Philadelphia, but I'm grateful for the big, close-knit family we grew up in.

I've watched Katie's incredible journey -- from becoming the first person in our family to attend a four-year college, to creating jobs as a business leader, to serving as Governor Tom Wolf's chief of staff, she's accomplished so much. I know she'll make a great senator, just like she's made a great environmental advocate, business leader, and public servant.

**And for her birthday, I 'd love to send her best wishes from all of her grassroots supporters. [Will you sign my birthday card for Katie? I'm positive she'd love to hear from you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9189584164792303616/400561981603446784?refcode=e20160510&refcode2=e20160510&ms=e20160510&amount=25)**

Sincerely,

Rick McGinty
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9189584164792303616/328504387565518848?refcode=e20160510&refcode2=e20160510&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/9189584164792303616/256446793527590912).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Miss Universe and Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Life imitating art. | Friend --

At his last White House Correspondents' Dinner, President Obama joked that while some people "say Donald lacks the foreign policy experience to be president... in fairness, he has spent years meeting with leaders from around the world: Miss Sweden, Miss Argentina, Miss Azerbaijan."

I don't know if you caught that speech, but it seems Donald Trump did.

A few days later, Trump said "I know Russia well. I had a major event in Russia two or three years ago, Miss Universe contest, which was a big, big, incredible event."

I'm sure the event was incredible. But I'm incredulous that Trump thinks hosting a beauty pageant is in the same galaxy as having experience dealing with Russia on the international stage.

We can’t risk a Trump presidency -- that’s why we launched the Stop Trump Fund to make sure we're building a campaign that brings home a win for Hillary this November.

**Are you in? Chip in to the Stop Trump Fund now to claim your free Team Hillary sticker, and let’s get going:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NDYxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM3ODAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0NDYxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM3ODAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0NDYxODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM3ODAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).

name: Corry Bliss
subject: Ted's record on Higher Education [WATCH]
body:
| Peter -- As thousands of students across Ohio graduate this month, Ohio families and students have no greater enemy than former Governor Ted Strickland when it comes to making college affordable or providing a better future for the next generation.

While Ted Strickland has a record of turning his back on Ohio students, Rob Portman has offered solutions to keep college affordable by increasing access to college credits for high school students, strengthening college savings accounts, lowering student loan rates, and helping low-income students get a college degree.

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FVQy_e4hSdkY&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=he_blast&n=1)
When Strickland was governor, not only did Ohio lose more than 350,000 jobs and rank 48th in job creation, but Strickland also cut funding for colleges and universities by $170 million, reversed his promise to freeze tuition, and drove up costs for students and parents.

Watch our new web ad "Higher Education" by [clicking here](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FVQy_e4hSdkY&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=he_blast&n=2)! Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=he_blast&n=3) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=he_blast&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=he_blast&n=5)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=he_blast&n=6). -=-=-

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Breaking news: Clinton TV ads back on
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
The corporate media have always treated this race as if it was over. The political establishment hopes we'll all just fall in line. But if you're looking for a sign that the Clinton campaign knows this primary is far from finished, here it is:
"Clinton back on the air with TV ads" - _Politico_ , May 9, 2016
The article concludes with this line, "Clinton's campaign is eager to stop Sanders from gaining momentum with a string of victories through May." But here's the truth: there is no stopping a set of ideas whose time has come, no matter how many ads they run.
West Virginia votes today. Oregon and Kentucky hold their primaries in one week. It's been a pretty crazy election, and I know that if we continue to stand together, anything is possible.
[**Add a $2.70 contribution to our campaign today and we are going to do very well in West Virginia, Oregon, and Kentucky. From there it 's on to California, New Jersey and the rest of the June 7th states, where there is so much at stake.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/every-last-vote?refcode=em160510-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/every-last-vote?refcode=em160510-s1-full")
Last week's victory in Indiana was a tremendous surprise to the corporate media and political establishment. Hopefully we'll enjoy the same result later tonight in West Virginia and in Oregon and Kentucky next week. Bernie's working hard, the staff and volunteers are doing the same. The rest is up to all of us.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/every-last-vote?refcode=em160510-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/every-last-vote?refcode=em160510-s1-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Michael Tyler, RussFeingold.com
subject: Update on the latest Koch attack
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
A small victory worth celebrating. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428e/1c469400/509744b/3562c49/1902267856/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-koch-may?utm_source=ema_2016-05-10_rdf-koch-may_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-10_rdf-koch-may_nd&utm_campaign=rdf-koch-may&utm_medium=ema") Friend, We just dealt a serious blow to the latest attack from the Koch brothers. **Yeste rday, three local TV stations refused to air a patently false Koch-backed attack ad that distorts Russ's record of fighting for veterans. **The Kochs can funnel all the money they want into dark-money super PACs. But, to their dismay, there are a few key things they can't buy. The Koch brothers can't buy the truth. And the Koch brothers can't buy grassroots support from thousands of committed people like you. Thank you for supporting Russ and for helping us create a strong grassroots army. It's because of you that we were able to get the message out about this ad. And it's because of you that several TV stations were alerted to the patently false nature of this ad and ultimately decided to stop running it. This isn't the first attack we've seen from these groups -- and it certainly won't be the last. But we've shown that the truth does matter, and we've shown that we're willing to fight back against their money. I can't say it enough. Thank you again. Michael Tyler
Communications Director P.S. Want to know another thing the Kochs can't buy? Integrity. **[Contribute today to show your strong support for Russ.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428e/1c469400/509744b/3562c49/1902267856/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-koch-may?utm_source=ema_2016-05-10_rdf-koch-may_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-10_rdf-koch-may_nd&utm_campaign=rdf-koch-may&utm_medium=ema")** | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428e/1c469400/509744b/3562c49/1902267856/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-koch-may?utm_source=ema_2016-05-10_rdf-koch-may_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-10_rdf-koch-may_nd&utm_campaign=rdf-koch-may&utm_medium=ema")
---

If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428e/1c469400/509744b/3562c44/1902267856/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: PETITION: Tell Congress to protect American consumers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

Friend,

Congress is back in session this week and the Republicans are back to pushing for sweetheart deals for big money special interests.

At this moment, Republicans are working to advance legislation that would not only allow but protect Wall Street and major corporations as they play fast and loose with billions in dangerous bets and trading. The House has already acted on this bill. Now, it is in the Senate.

I've been fighting against this kind of reckless legislation for a very long time. [**We cannot let this stand. Please add your name and demand that Republicans in Congress act to protect American consumers.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d08/70cdc2ba/47e1ad0e/396da32/338078213/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-congress-to-protect-american-consumers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+let+this+stand+Please+add+your&utm_campaign=em051016&source=em051016")

Supporters of the so-called Commodity End-User Relief Act are hoping that by pretending this bill benefits farmers and ranchers, we'll turn a blind eye to this reckless legislation. They're wrong.

Farmers and ranchers aren't making the billion dollar bets that this legislation permits -- it's Wall Street, big oil companies, and Koch Industries who are. This legislation would undermine the ability of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to do its job and protect consumers, American farmers, and our economy.

[**Please join me in signing this petition to tell Senate Majority leader Mitch McConnell that in its current state, the Commodity End-User Relief Act is dangerous to our economy, consumers and common sense oversight. It 's absolutely unacceptable. >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d08/70cdc2ba/47e1ad0e/396da32/338078213/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-congress-to-protect-american-consumers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+let+this+stand+Please+add+your&utm_campaign=em051016&source=em051016")

Thank you for adding your voice,

Chris

| **[SIGN MY NAME>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d08/70cdc2ba/47e1ad0e/396da32/338078213/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-congress-to-protect-american-consumers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+let+this+stand+Please+add+your&utm_campaign=em051016&source=em051016")**
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d08/70cdc2ba/47e1ad0e/396da31/338078213/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em051016&source=em051016") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: will you be one of the 9 we need in your town today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We literally cannot wait another day here | Friend --

There's an old rule of investing in campaigns: Your dollar today means more than your dollar tomorrow. So while it might seem silly that I'm asking you to **[chip in to our new Battleground Fund](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)** while we're still wrapping up this primary, give me a minute to explain why it's important:

Every day that we wait to start building the very best possible team in key states like Ohio and Colorado is a day that we delay reaching out to supporters to make sure they're registered to vote and ready to get out the word in their communities for Hillary. If we want to come out with a victory on November 8th, we have to put in the work right now.

**We're looking for 9 donations to the Battleground Fund from your area today -- will you chip in? When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker to say thanks!!**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Get out there!

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU0NTYyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNjA1Nzc5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We just won West Virginia!
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
We just got word that we won our 19th state, taking the majority of the delegates in today's primary in West Virginia.
**Every vote we earn and every delegate we secure sends an unmistakable message about the values we share, the country's support for the ideas of our campaign, and a rejection of Donald Trump and his values.**
Now we're on to two more primaries next week in Kentucky and Oregon, where we also hope to do very well. So let's keep going.
[**Add a $2.70 contribution to our campaign and we can win Kentucky and Oregon next week and send a powerful message that we'll fight for our values all the way up to the Democratic convention.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia-win?refcode=em160510 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia-win?refcode=em160510")
There is nothing I would like more than to take on and defeat Donald Trump, someone who must never become president of this country. But I believe that it is not enough to just reject Trump - this is an opportunity to define a progressive vision for America. **Voters agree: justtoday, three new polls showed that we are the best campaign to defeat Trump.**
We fully acknowledge we have an uphill climb ahead of us, but we're used to that. We have been fighting uphill from the day this campaign began, and we're going to stay in the race until the last vote is cast. And with your help, I hope to take on Trump, too. Thank you for standing with me.
[**Add a $2.70 contribution to our campaign now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia-win?refcode=em160510 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia-win?refcode=em160510")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia-win?refcode=em160510 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia-win?refcode=em160510")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
